Name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program
Amount: Full Tuition + Stipend + Airfare + Health Insurance
Description: US government ka most prestigious scholarship. 4000 awards annually. Tuition + living stipend + round trip airfare + health insurance fully covered. Apply through US Embassy in your country.
Notes 2026: Deadline varies by country. 2027-28 cycle opens Spring 2026. Check US Embassy Pakistan website.

Name: Chevening Scholarship 2027-28
Language Requirement: University requirement only - no separate IELTS for Chevening itself
Description: UK government flagship scholarship for future leaders. ~1500 awards yearly. Covers full tuition + monthly stipend + return flights + visa fee + arrival allowance.
Notes 2026: Applications open August 2026 for 2027-28 cycle. 2026-27 cycle already closed Oct 2025.

Name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship 2027-28
Amount: Full Tuition + 21000 GBP/year + Airfare + Visa Costs
Description: Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation funded. ~80 awards per year worldwide. Full Cambridge fees + maintenance + airfare + visa costs + up to 2000 GBP academic development fund.
Notes 2026: US citizens deadline Oct 2026. International students Dec 2026 or Jan 2027 by course. Opens Sep 2026.

Name: DAAD Scholarship 2026
Amount: 934 EUR/month Masters or 1200 EUR/month PhD + Health + Travel
Description: German Academic Exchange Service. One of worlds largest scholarship organizations. Monthly stipend + health insurance + travel subsidy + study allowance.
Notes 2026: Multiple programs available. Check daad.de for program-specific deadlines. Development-Related Postgraduate Courses popular for Pakistanis.

Name: Australia Awards Scholarship 2026
Amount: Full Tuition + 27082 AUD/year + Airfare + Health Cover + Establishment Allowance
Description: Australian Government scholarship for developing countries. Full coverage including pre-course English training if needed. Pakistan is eligible country.
Notes 2026: Apply through Australian High Commission Islamabad. Opens Jan-Feb closes April/May annually.

Name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Masters 2026
Amount: 24000 EUR/year non-EU or 16000 EUR/year EU students
Description: EU-funded joint degree taught across 2-3 European universities. 200+ programs available. Living costs + tuition + travel covered. Study in multiple countries.
Notes 2026: Each program has own deadline - most close Jan-Feb 2026 for Sep 2026 intake. Check specific program website.

Name: Rotary Peace Fellowship 2027
Country: USA / Japan / Sweden / UK / Uganda / Australia
Field: Peace and Development / International Relations / Public Health
Amount: Full Tuition + Stipend + Airfare + All Expenses
Language Requirement: IELTS or TOEFL required varies by host university
Description: For committed peacebuilders. ~130 fellows per year across 6 host universities worldwide. Fully funded. Very competitive - leadership and community service essential.
Notes 2026: Apply through local Rotary Club. Next cohort opens May 2026 for 2027 intake.

Name: Rhodes Scholarship 2027
Description: Oldest and most prestigious international scholarship est 1902. University of Oxford. ~100 scholars/year from 64 countries. Extraordinary academic + leadership record required.
Notes 2026: Extremely competitive. Pakistan quota exists. Check rhodeshouse.ox.ac.uk for country deadlines around Oct 2026.

Name: Commonwealth Scholarship 2026
Amount: Full Tuition + 1347 GBP/month + Airfare + Thesis Grant
Description: UK government scholarship for Commonwealth country citizens. 700+ awards annually. Research-focused - strong academic record essential. Pakistan is eligible.
Notes 2026: Apply via Higher Education Commission HEC Pakistan. Opens around Oct-Dec annually.

Name: Swedish Institute Scholarship SISGP 2026
Description: Swedish government scholarship for students from eligible countries including Pakistan. Living allowance + establishment grant + travel grant + insurance coverage.
Notes 2026: Open to Pakistani students. Applications typically open Nov-Dec close Feb. Check si.se for exact 2026-27 dates.

Name: Japanese MEXT Scholarship 2027
Language Requirement: JLPT N2 OR IELTS 5.5 some programs
Description: Japanese Ministry of Education scholarship. Japanese language training included 6 months pre-study. Covers everything. Apply through Japanese Embassy Islamabad.
Notes 2026: Embassy recommendation or university recommendation route. Opens around April-May annually.

Name: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship 2026
Field: Health / Education / Rural Development / Natural Resources
Amount: 50 percent Grant plus 50 percent Loan - loan forgiven for community service
Description: Need-based plus merit scholarship for students from developing countries. Focus on fields impacting quality of life. Strong community service record required.
Notes 2026: Pakistani students can apply. Applications open January each year. Financial need is key criterion alongside academic merit.

Name: Korean Government Scholarship KGSP 2026
Amount: Full Tuition + 900000 KRW/month + Korean Language Training + Airfare
Description: Korean government fully funded scholarship. Includes 1 year free Korean language training before studies. Growing English-medium programs available.
Notes 2026: Pakistani students eligible via embassy route. Embassy in Islamabad handles applications. Quota system applies.

Name: Chinese Government Scholarship CSC 2026
Amount: Full Tuition + 3000 CNY/month Masters + Accommodation + Airfare + Insurance
Description: China Scholarship Council scholarship. 50000 plus awards annually. Largest scholarship program in Asia. Many English programs. Strong Pakistan-China relations.
Notes 2026: Very accessible for Pakistani students. HEC Pakistan has quota. Also apply directly through Chinese universities. Good option with lower CGPA.

Name: HEC Need Based Scholarship Pakistan
Description: Higher Education Commission Pakistan need-based scholarship for deserving students studying in Pakistani universities. Merit plus financial need based.
Notes 2026: Exclusively for Pakistani students in Pakistan. Financial need documentation required. Highest acceptance rate.

Name: Stipendium Hungaricum 2026
Amount: Full Tuition + 130000-180000 HUF/month + Accommodation + Health Insurance
Description: Hungarian government scholarship via bilateral agreements. 7000 plus scholarships available. Good for STEM and Arts. Many English programs at top Hungarian universities.
Notes 2026: Pakistan has bilateral agreement. Apply through HEC Pakistan. Deadline usually mid-January each year. One of easier options.
